name: Citrus Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix gelatin, 1/2 cup sugar, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Beat together egg yolks, fruit juices, and water; stir into gelatin mixture.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat just till the mixture comes to boiling.
4. Remove from heat; stir in peels.
5. Chill, stirring occasionally, until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
6. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
7. Gradually add 1/3 cup sugar, beating to stiff peaks; fold in gelatin mixture.
8. Pile into cooled baked pastry shell.
9. Chill until firm.
10. Trim with whipped cream and thin orange slices cut into fourths.
